name: Winners Transportation Inc
recent_news: No M&A or operational news located in web search; no active company website identified. A 'Winners Transportation LLC' exists but is a trucking carrier (winnerstrans.com), appears unrelated to this Elizabeth, NJ livery entity.
fit_notes: Micro 2-employee livery operator at ~$150K revenue with a 'special_needs' tag rather than confirmed yellow-bus contracts. Too small/peripheral to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in; pass unless verified as a contracted SPED carrier with district routes.

name: Alpine Executive Sedan
recent_news: No web presence located; name and address (residential-style Reston condo block) indicate an executive sedan/livery sole-proprietor operation. No evidence of school-district contracts or SPED routes.
fit_notes: Not an independent school-bus operator. Executive sedan service is out of scope for a Summit yellow-bus/SPED tuck-in. Pass.

name: Nationwide Limousine Svc

fit_notes: Limousine service, not a school-bus contractor. No district routes or SPED contracts identified. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in; pass.

name: Als Limo Inc
recent_news: No company website or news located. Note: 'Hillman's Bus Service' (hillmanbus.com, est. 1924, South Jersey) is a separate yellow-bus contractor and not the same entity; no confirmed connection to Al Hillman in Hazlet.
fit_notes: Micro 2-employee livery operator; not confirmed as a school-bus/SPED contractor. Insufficient scale to move the needle on a Summit tuck-in. Pass unless verified to hold district SPED contracts.
